# Endor Labs Agent Kit Plugin Packages

<!-- Generated by Endor Labs Agent Kit. Do not hand-edit. -->

This directory contains generated plugin package artifacts. Generate or
refresh them with:

```bash
endor-agent-kit publish source/agents/*/recipe.yaml --dest . --prune --include-plugins
```

Current generated package slices:

- `codex/endor-labs-agent-kit/`: Codex plugin package with setup skill,
  Codex workflow skills, bundled custom-agent TOML files, installer script,
  and local marketplace metadata under `codex/.agents/plugins/marketplace.json`.
- `claude/endor-labs-agent-kit/`: Claude Code plugin package with setup skill,
  Claude Code workflow agents, minimal assets, and marketplace metadata under
  `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json` and `claude/.claude-plugin/marketplace.json`.

Gemini remains a planned release-critical host package. The Gemini slice
should generate a release archive rooted at `plugins/gemini/endor-labs-agent-kit`
so `gemini-extension.json` is at the archive root while the repository keeps
all generated host packages together.
